$comment: Curated static example authored by the top-level AI from the current inventory. This file was not generated by a runtime golden-flow execution.

transitions.sessionPersistence: A successful sign-in is saved to localStorage; reloading the page restores the signed-in view directly. Sign out clears it.
transitions.lockout: Five consecutive failed sign-in attempts replace the form with a 30-second countdown lockout; it clears automatically once the countdown reaches zero.
